name: blueprint-core
title: Blueprint Core
description: Token baseline and core UI primitives for Blueprint projects.

.bp-card.transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94), box-shadow 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94), border-color 0.35s ease

.bp-btn.transition: background-color 220ms ease, color 220ms ease, border-color 220ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease

.bp-input, .bp-textarea.transition: border-color 220ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease, background-color 220ms ease

.magnetic-button.transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 220ms ease, background-color 220ms ease, color 220ms ease, border-color 220ms ease

docs: Install with `npx shadcn@latest add @blueprint/blueprint-core --overwrite` after configuring @blueprint namespace in components.json.
